name: Kidney Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (1 can) kidney beans, rinsed well
16 oz (1 can) pinto beans, rinsed well
1 cup Romaine Lettuce leaves, torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the kidney beans and pinto beans with the grated dill pickle until well combined.
2. Add the diced celery to the mixture and stir gently.
3. Arrange lettuce leaves on a serving dish.
4. Spoon the bean mixture onto each leaf.
5. Drizzle the Anchovy Yogurt Dressing over the salad.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 99; CHO: 15g; CAR: 15g; PRO: 5g; SOD: 200mg; FAT: 3g
